Trubetix

Reports and analytics that make sense to founders, not just analysts.

Auto-generated weekly intelligence reports for B2B operators — fed by your CRM, ad accounts, and product analytics. Insights, not dashboards.

What's inside

The features that earn the price.

Auto-narrative reports

A weekly written briefing — what changed, why, and what to do.

Cross-platform aggregation

Meta, Google, LinkedIn, GA4, Mixpanel, Stripe, Razorpay.

Founder-readable

No dashboard archaeology — the answer is the email.

Transparent. No surprise enterprise tax. Talk to us before you commit.
